# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 30

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      build-version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build-timestamp: ${{ steps.timestamp.outputs.timestamp }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build Application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Generate Version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty)
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Version: ${VERSION}"

      - name: Generate Timestamp
        id: timestamp
        run: |
          TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y%m%d%H%M%S")
          echo "timestamp=${TIMESTAMP}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Timestamp: ${TIMESTAMP}"

      - name: Create Build Info
        run: |
          cat > build-info.json <<EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "timestamp": "${{ steps.timestamp.outputs.timestamp }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "commit": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}"
          }
          EOF
          cp build-info.json dist/

      - name: Upload Build Artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: |
            dist/
            package.json
            package-lock.json
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload Test Results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 7

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/
            config/

      - name: Download Build Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify Build Info
        run: |
          echo "Build Information:"
          cat ./artifacts/build-info.json
          echo ""
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"
          echo "Timestamp: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-timestamp }}"

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install Deployment Tools
        run: |
          npm install -g pm2
          npm install -g serve

      - name: Prepare Deployment Package
        run: |
          mkdir -p deployment
          cp -r ./artifacts/* deployment/
          chmod +x scripts/*.sh

      - name: Run Pre-deployment Checks
        run: |
          ./scripts/pre-deploy-checks.sh staging
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}

      - name: Deploy to Staging Server
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy.sh staging
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          SERVER_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SERVER_HOST }}
          SERVER_USER: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SERVER_USER }}
          ENVIRONMENT: staging

      - name: Run Health Checks
        run: |
          ./scripts/health-check.sh https://staging.example.com
        timeout-minutes: 5

      - name: Run Smoke Tests
        run: |
          ./scripts/smoke-tests.sh staging
        env:
          API_URL: https://staging.example.com/api

      - name: Notify Deployment Success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Staging deployment completed successfully"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/
            config/

      - name: Download Build Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify Build Info
        run: |
          echo "Production Deployment Information:"
          cat ./artifacts/build-info.json
          echo ""
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"
          echo "Timestamp: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-timestamp }}"

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install Deployment Tools
        run: |
          npm install -g pm2

      - name: Prepare Deployment Package
        run: |
          mkdir -p deployment
          cp -r ./artifacts/* deployment/
          chmod +x scripts/*.sh

      - name: Create Backup
        run: |
          ./scripts/backup.sh production
        env:
          BACKUP_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_BACKUP_KEY }}
          BACKUP_LOCATION: ${{ secrets.BACKUP_LOCATION }}

      - name: Run Pre-deployment Checks
        run: |
          ./scripts/pre-deploy-checks.sh production
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}

      - name: Deploy to Production Server
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy.sh production
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          SERVER_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SERVER_HOST }}
          SERVER_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SERVER_USER }}
          ENVIRONMENT: production

      - name: Run Health Checks
        run: |
          ./scripts/health-check.sh https://production.example.com
        timeout-minutes: 5

      - name: Run Smoke Tests
        run: |
          ./scripts/smoke-tests.sh production
        env:
          API_URL: https://production.example.com/api

      - name: Create Release Tag
        if: success()
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git tag -a "release-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}" -m "Production release ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"
          git push origin "release-${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Notify Deployment Success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-version }}"

  rollback:
    name: Rollback Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: failure() && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    needs: [build, deploy-production]
    environment:
      name: production-rollback
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Execute Rollback
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/rollback.sh
          ./scripts/rollback.sh production
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          SERVER_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SERVER_HOST }}
          SERVER_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SERVER_USER }}

      - name: Verify Rollback
        run: |
          ./scripts/health-check.sh https://production.example.com
